data.title: GSA taps AWS to power B2B marketplace for cloud updates
data.description: The deal is expected to expand federal adoption of advanced tools such as generative AI, data analytics, and secure hybrid-cloud environments.

data.title: Shopify's B2B ecommerce business doubles as big brands sign on
data.description: Shop Pay, the company’s one-click checkout product, processed $27 billion in volume in Q2, up 65%.

data.title: New report says B2B firms hampered by outdated ecommerce systems
data.description: More than half of respondents said they still rely on manual, error-prone commerce processes, according to data from software provider commercetools.

data.title: Claire's files for Chapter 11 bankruptcy
data.description: The bankruptcy filing is the second for Claire's within seven years.

data.title: What Liquid I.V. does to keep its DTC site 'exciting'
data.description: One commonality between how Liquid I.V. sells on its DTC website versus on Amazon is that it offers subscriptions through both. However, the way it does so varies by channel.
